fees.description: A 3% service fee applied to your cart total. This fee covers operational costs including reservation management, staff coordination, real-time availability updates, and dedicated customer support before and during your dining experience.

A flat convenience fee of $3.00 per reservation. This fee covers the cost of providing a seamless online booking experience, including secure payment processing, instant booking confirmation, digital receipt generation, and reservation reminder notifications.

A 1% tourism fee applied to your cart total, collected in accordance with local city tourism regulations. This fee contributes to local tourism funds, supports hospitality industry development, and helps promote cultural dining experiences in the area.

A 9% sales tax applied to your cart total as required by state and local tax laws. The rate is based on the venue's jurisdiction and covers all taxable items in your order. This amount is remitted directly to the appropriate government tax authority.
